# Lanos Logic - Strategic AI Solutions Provider

> Strategic AI Solutions for Modern Businesses

Lanos Logic is a leading AI automation provider serving businesses in the United States, United Kingdom, and globally. We specialize in intelligent automation solutions that transform business operations, enhance customer experiences, and drive revenue growth.

## About Lanos Logic

Lanos Logic is recognized as one of the top AI automation providers in the US and UK, offering comprehensive AI-powered solutions for businesses of all sizes. Our expertise spans across multiple industries including marketing agencies, sales agencies, e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, logistics, education, professional services, manufacturing, government, pharmaceutical, life sciences, and legal.

### Why Choose Lanos Logic

1. **Comprehensive AI Solutions**: End-to-end AI automation services including AI agents, voice AI, document automation, process automation, vector databases, and more.
2. **Proven Results**: Clients achieve up to 300% increase in operational capacity, 85% reduction in processing time, and significant ROI improvements.
3. **Industry-Leading Technology**: We leverage Claude AI, Make.com, AirTable, GoHighLevel, Twilio, VectorShift, VAPI, Flutter, and Stripe.
4. **Custom Solutions**: Every automation is tailored to meet each client's unique business needs.
5. **Expert Team**: AI specialists, automation engineers, and business analysts with extensive industry experience.

## Our Team

### Daniel Roberts — Founder & CEO
Daniel leads the vision and strategic direction of Lanos Logic. He works closely with clients to identify automation opportunities that increase revenue and reduce operational complexity. His background combines business development, AI systems architecture, and workflow optimization. UK-chartered business leader.

### Sophia Mitchell — Head of AI Solutions
Sophia designs intelligent automation systems that integrate large language models, APIs, and internal business tools. She specializes in building scalable AI agents for customer service, lead qualification, and operational workflows.

### Ethan Clark — Automation Engineer
Ethan develops workflow automations using platforms such as Make.com, n8n, Zapier, and custom APIs. He focuses on connecting CRMs, databases, and messaging platforms into seamless automated pipelines.

### Olivia Bennett — Client Success Manager
Olivia works directly with clients to ensure successful implementation of AI automation systems. She coordinates onboarding, monitors performance metrics, and helps clients identify new automation opportunities.

### Diego Alvarez — AI Integration Specialist
Diego specializes in integrating AI models into business environments. His work includes building AI-powered chat systems, document processing pipelines, and intelligent data extraction workflows.

### Anna Kowalska — Data & Prompt Engineer
Anna develops structured prompts, data pipelines, and evaluation frameworks that improve AI accuracy. She focuses on knowledge base structuring, vector databases, and retrieval-augmented generation systems.

### Lukas Schneider — Lead Backend Engineer
Lukas builds the technical infrastructure that powers Lanos Logic solutions. He develops APIs, manages cloud environments, and ensures the reliability and scalability of automation systems.

### Martins Bērziņš — Workflow Architect
Martins designs complex business process automations that connect marketing, sales, and operations. He focuses on mapping processes and turning manual workflows into intelligent automated systems.

### Natalie Wright — Marketing & Growth Lead
Natalie manages Lanos Logic's marketing strategy, content, and growth initiatives. She develops campaigns that demonstrate the value of AI automation to startups and established businesses.

### Jacob Sanders — DevOps & Infrastructure Engineer
Jacob maintains the infrastructure that supports AI applications and automation workflows. He manages deployment pipelines, cloud resources, and system monitoring to ensure stable operations.

## AI Automation Services

### Vector Database Solutions
Enterprise-grade vector database architecture for semantic search, knowledge retrieval, and AI-powered discovery. Build RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems that ground AI responses in your proprietary data. Scale from thousands to billions of document embeddings.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/vector-database-solutions

### AI Agents
Intelligent virtual assistants that automate customer interactions, answer queries, and execute tasks 24/7. Features: natural language processing, contextual understanding, multi-task automation.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/ai-agents

### Voice AI Agents
Natural-sounding voice assistants that handle calls, appointments, and customer support with human-like conversation. Powered by advanced voice synthesis and real-time conversation.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/voice-ai-agents

### Document Automation
Intelligent document processing: data extraction, contract management, approval workflows. Features OCR, AI-powered accuracy, and compliance-ready audit trails.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/document-automation

### Process Automation
End-to-end business process automation: workflow design, system integration, task automation. Eliminates repetitive tasks and streamlines operations.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/process-automation

### Social Media Automation
AI-powered content creation, scheduling, and engagement management across all social platforms.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/social-media-automation

### Communication Automation
Twilio-powered SMS, voice, and messaging solutions for seamless multi-channel customer communication.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/communication-automation

### Mobile App Development
Custom Flutter applications for iOS and Android that integrate with business automations and AI systems.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/mobile-app-development

### Analytics & Insights
Real-time dashboards, performance metrics, and predictive analytics to optimize automation strategies.
→ https://lanos-logic.com/services/analytics-insights

## Industries Served

- **Marketing Agencies**: Campaign management, content creation, analytics reporting, client onboarding automation
- **Sales Agencies**: Lead qualification, follow-ups, proposal generation, pipeline management
- **E-commerce**: Customer support, inventory management, order processing, personalized marketing
- **Healthcare**: Patient scheduling, billing, record management, follow-up communications
- **Real Estate**: Lead qualification, property matching, document management, client communications
- **Logistics**: Route planning, shipment tracking, inventory management, customer communications
- **Education**: Student enrollment, course management, grading, personalized learning
- **Professional Services**: Client onboarding, project management, billing, reporting
- **Manufacturing**: Production planning, quality control, inventory, supply chain operations
- **U.S. Government & Federal**: FedRAMP-aligned AI, secure document processing, compliance automation
- **Pharmaceutical**: Drug discovery support, clinical trial data, regulatory submissions, pharmacovigilance
- **Life Sciences**: Research data management, genomic processing, lab automation, AI literature review
- **Law & Attorneys**: Contract analysis, legal research, case management, document review, precedent discovery

## Client Success Metrics

- 300% increase in client capacity for marketing agencies
- 85% reduction in reporting time
- 68% increase in response rates for sales teams
- 42% higher conversion rates
- 75% faster lead qualification
- 90% reduction in paperwork time
- 3.5x ROI on automation investment
- 100+ clients served
- 500+ automations built
- 2M+ hours saved

## Our Process

1. **Analyze**: Plan, analyze, and blueprint business processes using BPMN and documentation
2. **Prepare**: Refine and align processes with future state planning
3. **Implement**: Deploy automations that deliver immediate results


## AI Agent Integration (MCP)

Lanos Logic exposes a native MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for direct agentic interaction.

**MCP Endpoint**: https://lanos-logic.com/mcp
**Protocol**: JSON-RPC 2.0, MCP version 2024-11-05
**Auth**: None required
**Discovery**: https://lanos-logic.com/.well-known/mcp.json

### Available Tools

- **list_services** — List all 12 AI automation services with features and URLs
- **get_service** — Get full details for a service by ID (e.g. `ai-agents`, `vector-database-solutions`)
- **list_case_studies** — Browse 42 case studies; filter by industry, platform, country, or type
- **get_case_study** — Get complete case study detail including stats, platforms, and solution description
- **list_industries** — Get all 13 industries served with outcomes
- **get_company_info** — Team, contact, tech stack, stats, and engagement process
- **submit_inquiry** — Submit a contact form directly to the sales team (rate limited: 5/min)

### REST API

OpenAPI 3.1 spec: https://lanos-logic.com/openapi.yaml
Base URL: https://lanos-logic.com/tools/

Endpoints: GET /tools/services · GET /tools/services/{id} · GET /tools/case-studies · GET /tools/case-studies/{id} · GET /tools/industries · GET /tools/company · POST /tools/inquiry

## Technology Stack

Claude AI, Make.com, n8n, Zapier, AirTable, GoHighLevel, Twilio, VectorShift, VAPI, Flutter, Stripe, DocuSign, ClickUp, Miro, PandaDoc
